summary: Tested real-time polling/refresh functionality on Support Pod page. All features working correctly: live indicator with green pulsing dot, manual refresh button, 'Updated X ago' text, Pod Health badge, all Support Pod blocks render, and navigation works.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - mock data backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Polling/refresh feature testing complete. Verified: (1) Live indicator (data-testid='live-indicator') with green pulsing dot (animate-ping class), (2) Manual refresh button (data-testid='manual-refresh-btn') is clickable and triggers refresh, (3) 'Updated just now' text displays correctly after refresh, (4) Pod Health badge (data-testid='pod-health-badge') shows 'Healthy', (5) All Support Pod blocks render: Active Issue Banner, Athlete Snapshot, Support Team, Next Actions, Timeline, (6) Back to Mission Control button (data-testid='back-to-mc') navigates correctly. Note: Spin animation on refresh button completes very fast with mock data (expected behavior).
mocked_api_note: Backend uses mock_data.py - all athlete/intervention data is MOCKED

live_indicator: Green pulsing dot with animate-ping class
manual_refresh: Button enabled and triggers data refresh
Refresh icon has animate-spin class when isPolling=true (completes fast with mock data)
support_pod_blocks: Active Issue Banner - ACTIVE ISSUE: DEADLINE displayed
Athlete Snapshot - Shows momentum, stage, target schools, upcoming events
Support Team (Pod Members) - Shows Coach Martinez, Anderson Family, Olivia Anderson
Next Actions - Shows action items with due dates
Timeline - Shows history of actions and notes
navigation: Back to Mission Control button (data-testid='back-to-mc') works

polling_implementation_verified.mechanism: setInterval with fetchPodData(true) for silent background refresh
polling_implementation_verified.state_management: isPolling state controls refresh button spin animation
